title: Craftformers - Reimagined
description: Texture pack for "Craftformers prime" mod to make transformers look.. reimagined?
body:
Texture pack for "Craftformers Prime" mod aimed to change default look of Vehicon soldiers, And some of the named characters.
Added named characters: Megatron, Ratchet, Soundwave, Wheeljack, Bulkhead, Optimus Prime. More to come in the future.

This texture packs includes:
-New Design for basic/standart Vehicons and named characters. WORKS WITH TRANSFORMER EDITOR!!!! (some parts changes if u paint them).
-Changing the shape of transformer body (a bit).
-Adding custom color placements for customization.
-Adding custom energon color placements for customization (glows with shaders).


Hope u like new design)) Play, enjoy, share)) ♥♥♥


![WORKS WITH CUSTOM CHARACTERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19e229d1150b422fc8c4404ccaf613ba41975018_0.webp)
